message:
feat(session): add lifecycle management with TTL, extend, and expire

Implements session lifecycle for multi-step agent workflows: create with
TTL and agent metadata, status with expiry check, extend TTL, end with
summary, and batch expire sweep. 11 tests.

Closes: process_triage-8ba

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
